name: Calendar
description: Date calendar supporting single date and date range selection with full keyboard navigation.
whenToUse: When users need to pick a date from a visual calendar grid.
avoidWhen: For simple date input - use a native date <input> instead.
accessibilityRequirements: Arrow keys navigate days (Left/Right/Up/Down). Home/End jump to first/last day. PageUp/PageDown change months. Enter/Space selects. Visual focus indicator on focused day.

value.description: Selected date (ISO format) or {start,end} for range mode

default-date.description: Initial visible/selected date when value is not provided (ISO)

route.label: Calendar
route.description: Date selection with single and range modes

examples.title: Single Date Selection
examples.description: Click any day to select. Use arrow keys to navigate, Enter or Space to select.

examples.title: Date Range Selection
examples.description: Click to set start date, click again to set end date. Range is highlighted.

examples.title: Min/Max Constraints
examples.description: Limit selectable dates with min and max props.
examples.code: Only dates between Jan 15 and Feb 15 are selectable

examples.title: Keyboard Navigation
examples.code:
Keyboard Shortcuts:

  • ArrowLeft / ArrowRight: Previous/Next day
  • ArrowUp / ArrowDown: Previous/Next week
  • Home: First day of month
  • End: Last day of month
  • PageUp / PageDown: Previous/Next month
  • Enter / Space: Select focused day
